# Kubernetes Fault Scenarios Report

**Generated:** Auto-generated by Scenario Generator
**Location:** `~/clawd/projects/opensre/examples/bookstore/faults/`
**Total Scenarios:** 154 YAML files

## Overview

This collection contains realistic Kubernetes fault scenarios for OpenSRE demo and testing. Each scenario is designed to:
1. Deploy a faulty version of a bookstore service
2. Include comments explaining the fault and expected behavior
3. Be detectable by OpenSRE monitoring

---

## Categories

### Pod Failures (10 scenarios)

| File | Scenario | Root Cause | Detection |
|------|----------|------------|-----------|
| `crash-loop.yaml` | CrashLoopBackOff | Container crashes repeatedly | Pod restart count, CrashLoopBackOff status |
| `image-pull-error.yaml` | ImagePullBackOff | Non-existent image tag | ErrImagePull/ImagePullBackOff events |
| `init-container-failure.yaml` | Init container crash | Init container exits non-zero | Pod stuck in Init:CrashLoopBackOff |
| `liveness-probe-failure.yaml` | Liveness fails | App stops responding to health checks | Pod restarts, liveness failure events |
| `readiness-probe-failure.yaml` | Readiness fails | App never becomes ready | No traffic, 0 endpoints |
| `oom-kill.yaml` | OOMKilled | Memory limit exceeded | OOMKilled status, restart reason |
| `evicted-pod.yaml` | Pod evicted | Resource pressure | Evicted status, node pressure events |
| `pending-pod-no-resources.yaml` | Pending (resources) | Insufficient CPU/memory | FailedScheduling events |
| `pending-pod-no-node.yaml` | Pending (node) | Node selector mismatch | FailedScheduling events |
| `terminating-stuck.yaml` | Stuck terminating | Finalizer blocking | Pod stuck in Terminating |

### Resource Issues (10 scenarios)

| File | Scenario | Root Cause | Detection |
|------|----------|------------|-----------|
| `cpu-throttling.yaml` | CPU throttling | CPU limits too low | High throttling %, slow responses |
| `memory-leak.yaml` | Memory leak | Unbounded memory growth | Rising memory usage, eventual OOM |
| `disk-pressure.yaml` | Disk pressure | Ephemeral storage full | DiskPressure condition, eviction |
| `pvc-pending.yaml` | PVC pending | Storage class missing | PVC stuck in Pending |
| `resource-quota-exceeded.yaml` | Quota exceeded | Namespace quota hit | FailedCreate events |
| `limit-range-violation.yaml` | LimitRange violation | Pod exceeds limits | Pod creation rejected |
| `horizontal-scaling-maxed.yaml` | HPA at max | Max replicas reached | ScalingLimited condition |
| `vertical-oom.yaml` | VPA ignored | VPA Off mode | OOMKilled despite recommendations |
| `emptydir-full.yaml` | EmptyDir full | Volume sizeLimit exceeded | Write errors, health check fails |
| `cpu-spike.yaml` | CPU spike | High CPU usage | CPU metrics spike |

### Network Issues (10 scenarios)

| File | Scenario | Root Cause | Detection |
|------|----------|------------|-----------|
| `dns-resolution-failure.yaml` | DNS failure | Non-existent service | DNS lookup errors in logs |
| `service-endpoint-missing.yaml` | No endpoints | Selector mismatch | Service has 0 endpoints |
| `network-policy-blocking.yaml` | NetworkPolicy blocking | Deny-all policy | Connection timeouts |
| `connection-timeout.yaml` | Connection timeout | Unreachable upstream | Timeout errors in logs |
| `connection-refused.yaml` | Connection refused | Port not listening | ECONNREFUSED errors |
| `ssl-certificate-expired.yaml` | SSL expired | Certificate expired | TLS handshake failures |
| `ingress-misconfigured.yaml` | Ingress 404/502 | Wrong service/port | HTTP 404/502 errors |
| `service-mesh-sidecar-crash.yaml` | Sidecar crash | Envoy misconfigured | 1/2 Ready, mTLS failures |
| `headless-dns-issue.yaml` | Headless DNS empty | Pods not ready | No A records returned |
| `high-latency.yaml` | High latency | Slow responses | P99 latency metrics |

| File | Scenario | Root Cause | Detection |
|------|----------|------------|-----------|
| `configmap-missing.yaml` | ConfigMap missing | CM doesn't exist | CreateContainerConfigError |
| `secret-missing.yaml` | Secret missing | Secret doesn't exist | MountVolume.SetUp failed |
| `env-var-wrong.yaml` | Bad config values | Invalid config format | App crashes on validation |
| `volume-mount-readonly.yaml` | Read-only volume | Write to RO mount | PermissionError in logs |
| `security-context-violation.yaml` | Security violation | runAsNonRoot fails | Container start blocked |
| `service-account-missing.yaml` | SA missing | RBAC denied | 403 errors from API |
| `webhook-rejection.yaml` | Webhook rejection | Policy violation | Admission denied errors |
| `timezone-wrong.yaml` | Wrong timezone | TZ misconfigured | Scheduled tasks run wrong time |
| `token-expiration.yaml` | Token expired | SA token expired | 401 Unauthorized |
| `feature-flag-misconfigured.yaml` | Feature flag wrong | Bad flag config | Unexpected behavior |

### Deployment Issues (10 scenarios)

| File | Scenario | Root Cause | Detection |
|------|----------|------------|-----------|
| `rollout-stuck.yaml` | Rollout stuck | New pods not ready | ProgressDeadlineExceeded |
| `replica-mismatch.yaml` | Replica mismatch | Some pods failing | Available < Desired |
| `pod-disruption-budget.yaml` | PDB blocking | minAvailable too high | Cannot evict pods |
| `version-incompatible.yaml` | API deprecated | Old API version | API errors, warnings |
| `affinity-conflict.yaml` | Affinity deadlock | Anti-affinity impossible | Pods stuck Pending |
| `topology-spread-violation.yaml` | Topology spread | Unbalanced zones | FailedScheduling |
| `slow-start.yaml` | Slow start killed | Probe too aggressive | Restart before ready |
| `job-backoff-exceeded.yaml` | Job failed | BackoffLimit reached | Job status Failed |
| `circular-dependency.yaml` | Circular deps | Services wait for each other | Init containers stuck |
| `graceful-shutdown-timeout.yaml` | Shutdown timeout | Ignores SIGTERM | SIGKILL after grace period |

---

## Usage

### Apply a single scenario:
```bash
kubectl apply -f ~/clawd/projects/opensre/examples/bookstore/faults/dns-resolution-failure.yaml
```

### Apply all scenarios:
```bash
kubectl apply -f ~/clawd/projects/opensre/examples/bookstore/faults/
```

### Clean up:
```bash
kubectl delete -f ~/clawd/projects/opensre/examples/bookstore/faults/
```

---

## Scenario Format

Each YAML file follows this structure:
```yaml
# Scenario: <Name>
# Expected: <What OpenSRE should detect>
# Remediation: <How to fix>
# Root Cause: <Why this fails>
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: <service>-<fault-suffix>
  namespace: bookstore
  labels:
    app: <service>
    fault: <fault-type>
spec:
  ...
```

---

## Testing with OpenSRE

1. Start OpenSRE monitoring on the bookstore namespace
2. Apply one or more fault scenarios
3. Verify OpenSRE detects the issue within expected time
4. Check that root cause is correctly identified
5. Verify remediation suggestions are appropriate
6. Clean up the scenario

---

## Contributing

To add new scenarios:
1. Create a new YAML file in the `faults/` directory
2. Follow the naming convention: `<fault-type>.yaml`
3. Include header comments with Scenario/Expected/Remediation/Root Cause
4. Use unique names with fault suffix (e.g., `payment-service-dns-fail`)
5. Add labels for categorization
6. Update this report
